title: Villager Names
description: Give all villagers random names with just a datapack!
body:
**Random villager names, with just a datapack!**
- 337 names!
- Common, uncommon, and rare
- Renames existing unnamed villagers but does not modify already named villagers
- Nothing too modern

View name lists in the [github source code](https://github.com/thesorcell/named_villagers)
